text: Based on a complete visual inspection of the interior and exterior areas of the subject property, defined scope of work, statement of assumptions and limiting conditions, and appraiser’s certification, my (our) opinion of the market value, as defined, of the real property that is the subject of this report is $185,000 as of 12/29/2025, which is the date of inspection and the effective date of this appraisal. The appraisal is made with the subject in "as is" condition. There is no personal property included in the final estimate of value.
